name: Jaeger (Distributed Tracing)
description: End-to-end distributed tracing with an OpenTelemetry-compatible collector and a rich web UI to inspect spans, latencies and service dependencies.

aws.parity: Emit OTLP spans locally to Jaeger exactly as you will to X-Ray — same instrumentation, no app changes.
aws.deploy: Swap the OTLP exporter target for the AWS Distro for OpenTelemetry (ADOT) collector that ships traces to X-Ray.

variables.label: Jaeger UI Port
variables.description: Port on your host machine to access the Jaeger web UI.

variables.label: OTLP gRPC Port
variables.description: Port for ingesting traces via the OpenTelemetry Protocol over gRPC.

variables.label: OTLP HTTP Port
variables.description: Port for ingesting traces via the OpenTelemetry Protocol over HTTP.
